race.comment: DREAM LANTERN (9) missed the placings two starts back then ran a better race and finished 6 lengths away in fourth last time out over 1300m at this track after being in contention on the corner. Likely improver with strong winning prospects. REJOICED (2) was in contention on the turn and ran a better race last start to finish a close second over 1300m here after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Suitably placed so anticipating another big run. WARILLA GORILLA (8) last start finished fifth over 1200m at this circuit. Draws low with the claim and look for a better run this time out. LUTON HOO (6) lines up for the first time since February 14. Looking to emulate her win at Sunshine Coast when returning from a spell last prep. Has a strong first-up record, scoring on two occasions from four starts and shapes as one to consider.
